title: castilleja pallida var. angustata
intro: Castilleja pallida var. angustata, also known as Pale Indian Paintbrush, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. It is a hemiparasitic plant, obtaining some of its nutrients by drawing them from the roots of surrounding plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Castilleja pallida var. angustata can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, which also include providing relief from fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
